data.title: Franklin Templeton Expands Tokenized U.S. Treasury Fund to Europe
data.description:
According to Foresight News, Franklin Templeton, an asset management company, has launched the Franklin OnChain U.S. Government Money Fund in Luxembourg. This tokenized U.S. Treasury fund aims to broaden its reach to European institutional investors. The fund will be accessible to investors in eight European countries, including Austria, France, Germany, Italy, Liechtenstein, the Netherlands, Spain, and Switzerland.

Since its initial debut in 2021, the U.S.-registered version of the fund has attracted over $580 million in assets, exclusively from American investors.

data.title: NKLA Drops 50%+ as EV Firm Files for Bankruptcy
data.description:
Nikola Corporation has filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy to address financial challenges, aiming to auction assets while maintaining limited operations until March 2025.
The post NKLA Drops 50%+ as EV Firm Files for Bankruptcy appeared first on Tokenist.
source: https://tokenist.com/nkla-drops-50-as-ev-firm-files-for-bankruptcy/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=nkla-drops-50-as-ev-firm-files-for-bankruptcy

data.title: DeepSeek Considers External Funding For The First Time
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on February 19, DeepSeek is contemplating raising funds from external sources for the first time, as reported by The Information.

data.title: SEC Acknowledges Bitwise XRP ETF Filing—Approval Within Reach?
data.description:
The Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has formally acknowledged a filing for a spot XRP Exchange-Traded Fund (ETF) from Bitwise. This marks the start of the regulatory review process, which could take up to 90 days. The filing, submitted by Cboe BZX Exchange on February 6, 2025, aims to list the Bitwise XRP ETF as […]

source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/02/19/sec-acknowledges-bitwise-xrp-etf-filing-approval-within-reach/

data.title: Coinbase Publishes Bitcoin Reserves for cbBTC—Here’s What You Need to Know
data.description:
TL;DR Coinbase has recently unveiled its Proof of Reserves for its wrapped Bitcoin token, cbBTC. This move aims to enhance transparency and reassure users that each cbBTC token is backed 1:1 by Bitcoin (BTC) held by the exchange. The introduction of PoR is a significant step towards addressing concerns about the transparency and liquidity of ... 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/coinbase-publishes-bitcoin-reserves-for-cbbtc-heres-what-you-need-to-know/

data.title: Franklin Templeton Tokenized U.S. Treasury Fund to be Open to Institutional Investors in 8 European Countries
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Asset management company Franklin Templeton said it has launched the tokenized U.S. Treasury bond fund Franklin OnChain U.S. Government Money Fund in Luxembourg to expand its coverage of European institutional investors. The fund will be open to institutional investors in eight European countries on the Stellar network (XLM), namely Austria, France, Germany, Italy, Liechtenstein, the Netherlands, Spain and Switzerland. (Coindesk)

data.title: eToro receives MiCA license to offer cryptocurrency services in Europe
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: eToro announced that the Cyprus Securities and Exchange Commission (CySEC) has granted its EU subsidiary eToro (Europe) Ltd a license to provide crypto services to all EU member states under the framework of the Crypto Asset Regulatory Market (MiCA). The company said that this authorization allows it to operate in a unified European crypto regulatory environment, but it must submit relevant notifications to each member state. (financefeeds)

data.title: Google Gemini may add AI video generation function
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Google App v16.6.23 code shows that Gemini may soon support video generation (videogen) function, but the function has not yet been officially launched and the release time is uncertain. "Videogen" and "robin" (Gemini's internal code) appear together in the code, and include prompts such as "We will notify you when it is ready", suggesting that Gemini may have AI video generation capabilities. Currently, Google has launched Google Vids, which supports script writing, editing, voice generation, background removal and other functions, but it is not a pure generative AI video system. (Jinshi)

data.title: WisdomTree launches crypto ETP product WCRP and lists it on multiple European exchanges
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News WisdomTree announced the launch of the crypto ETP product WisdomTree Physical CoinDesk 20 ETP (WCRP), which is currently listed on Börse Xetra, Swiss Stock Exchange and Euronext Paris and Amsterdam. WisdomTree Physical CoinDesk 20 ETP was developed in cooperation with CoinDesk Indices and aims to provide investment channels for about 20 highly liquid crypto assets.
